summary: CP0 scaffold and local environment setup completed. Python 3.12, backend venv, frontend tooling, and Alembic are ready for CP1.
notes: Shell PATH now prefers Homebrew Python 3.12 via ~/.zshenv and ~/.zprofile. Backend scaffold follows clean architecture boundaries from CP0 onward: domain, application use cases, HTTP adapters, and infrastructure are separated so CP1 and CP2 can build without a structural rewrite.
